ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "yyyymmdd" TEXT /* Date in YYYYMMDD format */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the provinces table */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographical code of the province */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the age_groups table */,
  "confirmed_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was confirmed */,
  "transmission_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transmission_types table */,
  "transmission_location" TEXT /* Location of transmission (e.g., country, city) */,
  "notes_comorbidity" TEXT /* Notes on any comorbidities present */,
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the comorbidities table */,
  "case_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the case_status table */,
  "symptom_onset_date" TEXT /* Date of symptom onset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_comorbidity_id FOREIGN KEY ("comorbidity_id") REFERENCES comorbidities ("comorbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_transmission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_type_id") REFERENCES transmission_types ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_case_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_status_id") REFERENCES case_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Geographical code of the province */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the province per square kilometer */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_types" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type (e.g., community, travel-related) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comorbidity */,
  "comorbidity_name" TEXT /* Description of the comorbidity (e.g., hypertension, diabetes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the comorbidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status (e.g., recovered, active, deceased) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Description of the age range (e.g., 0-18, 19-35, 36-60, 60+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Description of the symptom (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_symptoms" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reports table */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the symptoms table */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reports table */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1, 2, booster) */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
